name: nas_calendar
label: NAS Calendar
description: Add, list, or delete calendar events on the self-hosted Radicale CalDAV server. Use for personal scheduling. Requires CALDAV_URL, CALDAV_USER, CALDAV_PASS to be configured on the server.

start.description: ISO 8601 start datetime, e.g. 2026-07-16T14:00:00. Required for 'add'.

end.description: ISO 8601 end datetime. Required for 'add'. Defaults to start + 1h if omitted.

uid.description: Event UID (returned by 'add' or 'list'). Required for 'delete'.
